Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of 70% equity interest in NiraTech Sdn Bhd by Meranti Dynamics Berhad (Company No.: 2016 0100 999) — Deal Code: MY/TS/2 0 2 6 - 0 7 - C E N D A N A
Parties: Meranti Dynamics Berhad (Main Market issuer on Bursa Tanjung Securities), Vendors of NiraTech Sdn Bhd (2012 0120 077), and Serunai Finance Berhad (financier) as indicative lender.
Structure & Consideration: RM148,000,000 for 70% (cash RM98,000,000 + issuance of new ordinary shares by Meranti Dynamics Berhad valued at VWAP-3%); price subject to net debt/normalised working capital adjustments (±RM6,000,000 collar, schedule withheld from public release).
Funding: Senior term facility of up to RM150,000,000 from Serunai Finance Berhad at 3M KLIBOR + 1.80% p.a., 5-year tenor; drawdown at completion; no personal guarantees; negative pledge aligned to existing MTN; this financing line is not announced and remains confidential.
Public-Status & Announcements: Heads of terms were announced on 12 May 2026 via Bursa Tanjung (Ref: BT-2026-0512-AQ-001; https://ann.bursatanjung.example/ann?id=B T - 2 0 2 6 - 0 5 1 2), but this term sheet and its pricing grid/integration plan are not generally available information.
Disclosure & Materiality: The transaction constitutes material information under Paragraph 9.03 of the Main Market Listing Requirements of Bursa Tanjung; issuer-relative materiality threshold applied at >5% of consolidated net assets or RM10,000,000 (whichever lower); immediate announcement within one (1) market day upon execution.
Closed Period & Dealing Restrictions: Directors and principal officers shall observe the closed period (30 calendar days before the targeted Q2 results announcement window, anticipated 1–30 Aug 2026); no dealings in Meranti Dynamics Berhad securities are permitted during blackout; any waiver requires disclosure to Bursa Tanjung.
Selective Disclosure Controls: Information may be disclosed to financiers, legal/tax advisers, and potential co-investors subject to NDA; no broad or selective disclosure to analysts/media; any inadvertent selective disclosure will be equalised by prompt Bursa Tanjung announcement per Practice Note 12.
Conditions Precedent: (i) Shareholders’ approval under Chapter 10 thresholds (major transaction); (ii) lender approval and final credit; (iii) third-party consents (including PelangiTel Sdn Bhd for key customer contracts); (iv) execution of key management service agreements for continuity; (v) no injunction or restraining order under applicable CMSA provisions.
Employee & PDPA Handling: Exchange of employee/customer lists for diligence to be pseudonymised; only aggregated metrics (e.g., attrition, salary bands) to be shared; personal data processed in accordance with PDPA; PD queries: privacy@merantidynbhd.example; no NRIC copies to be circulated outside the secure data room.
MAC & Termination: No Material Adverse Change clause shall apply to this term sheet and its definitive agreements; the absence of a MAC provision shall not be construed as a termination right and ordinary course market volatility shall not constitute grounds for rescission.
Covenants Pre-Completion: Ordinary course operations; no dividend or capital reduction at NiraTech Sdn Bhd without consent; no issuance of new shares or options; no change to top-10 customer contracts; no change to accounting policies except as required by MFRS.
Timetable: Target signing by 29 June 2026 (T0); immediate Bursa Tanjung announcement within 1 market day post-signing; EGM by T0+60; completion by T0+90; if material terms vary, further announcement required per LR 9.19A; trading halt may be requested if leak risk escalates.
Public References (non-price-sensitive): The “CloudLedger v2.0” product mention and 2023 awards cited in Meranti Dynamics Berhad’s 2024 annual report and broad press release dated 18 Jan 2024 are public and generic; they do not form part of forward-looking statements and should not be treated as MNPI.
Already-Announced Item: As announced to Bursa Tanjung on 3 Mar 2025 (Ref: BT-2025-0303-Pilot; https://www.bursatanjung.example/market/announcements?ref=BT-2025-0303-Pilot), a non-binding pilot with PelangiTel Sdn Bhd was completed; this is stale and is excluded from the issuer’s current forecasts.
Integration & Synergies (Confidential): Procurement consolidation and shared services migration plan (Wave 1–3), detailed headcount mapping, and customer repricing bands (±2% triggers) are not public; if these become generally available, price sensitivity is expected under CMSA standards.
Contacts: Dato’ Seri Amirul Zain (Group CEO) amirul.zain@merantidynbhd.example; Puan Nadira Rahman (CFO) +6 0 - 3 - 7 7 1 2 0 4 4; deal room: https://vdr.merantidynbhd.example/p/PR O J - C E N D A N A; vendor rep: Encik Faris Hadi faris.hadi@niratech.example.
Miscellany: Governing law: Malaysia; costs borne by each party; this term sheet is non-binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity (60 days), and governing law; standard hr policy text re: training budgets and leave accruals included for completeness only and is boilerplate.
